mapper.sql: id, name, task_definition_code, script_code, task_type, content, params, workspace_id, source_type, workflow_instance_id, status, runtime_type, app_id, tracking_url, execution_host, log_path, started_at, finished_at, duration, error_message, result_path, row_count, var_pool, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at
mapper.select: select from t_r_task_instance where script_code = #{scriptCode} order by created_at desc
select from t_r_task_instance where workflow_instance_id = #{workflowInstanceId} order by created_at asc
select from t_r_task_instance where status in ('PENDING', 'RUNNING') order by created_at desc
select from t_r_task_instance where script_code = #{scriptCode} and status in ('PENDING', 'RUNNING') order by created_at desc
select from t_r_task_instance where workflow_instance_id = #{workflowInstanceId} and status in ('SUCCESS', 'FAILED', 'CANCELLED', 'SKIPPED')
select from t_r_task_instance where workflow_instance_id = #{workflowInstanceId} and status in ('PENDING', 'RUNNING')
